home.hero_subtitle: Explore mountains, lakes, caves, cities, beaches, museums, hiking trails, and more across Bulgaria.
home.about_text: An open-source portfolio project built with Next.js, Supabase, and OpenStreetMap data. Browse and discover the natural and cultural highlights of Bulgaria.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.meta_description: Find answers to common questions about Bulgarian tourist destinations, how to use the site, and travel tips.
faq.a_what_is: This is a free, open-source tourism guide for Bulgaria. It features over 500 tourist destinations across 9 categories — lakes, mountains, caves, cities, fishing spots, trails, beaches, museums, and hiking routes — with bilingual content in English and Bulgarian.
faq.q_data_source: Where does the data come from?
faq.a_data_source: Place data is sourced from OpenStreetMap (via the Overpass API) and enriched with descriptions and Wikipedia links from Wikidata. All data sources are free and open-licensed.
faq.q_is_free: Is this site free to use?
faq.a_is_free: Yes, completely free. The site is non-commercial and open-source under the MIT license. You can find the source code on GitHub.
faq.q_best_time: What is the best time to visit Bulgaria?
faq.a_best_time: Bulgaria is a year-round destination. Summer (June–August) is ideal for beaches and hiking. Winter (December–March) is great for skiing. Spring and autumn offer mild weather perfect for exploring caves, cities, and cultural sites.
faq.q_visa: Do I need a visa to visit Bulgaria?
faq.a_visa: Bulgaria is an EU member state. EU/EEA citizens do not need a visa. Citizens of many other countries can visit visa-free for up to 90 days. Check your country's specific requirements before traveling.
faq.a_currency: Bulgaria uses the Bulgarian Lev (BGN). 1 EUR is approximately 1.96 BGN (the rate is fixed). Credit cards are widely accepted in cities, but carry cash for rural areas.
faq.q_find_near_me: How do I find places near me?
faq.a_find_near_me: Use the Map page to see all places on an interactive map. You can filter by category and zoom into your area of interest to discover nearby destinations.
faq.q_report_error: How do I report incorrect information?
faq.a_report_error: Since this is an open-source project, you can open an issue on the GitHub repository. We appreciate contributions and corrections from the community.
faq.q_offline: Can I use this site offline?
faq.a_offline: Currently the site requires an internet connection. We may add offline support and downloadable maps in the future.

about.title: About
about.meta_description: Learn about the Bulgarian Tourism Guide — an open-source project showcasing tourist destinations across Bulgaria.
about.mission_text: Making Bulgarian tourism accessible to everyone. This site provides a comprehensive, free, and bilingual guide to over 500 tourist destinations across Bulgaria — from mountain peaks and caves to beaches and historical cities.
about.data_text: All place data is sourced from free, open-licensed projects:
about.data_osm: OpenStreetMap — geographic data and coordinates (ODbL license)
about.data_wikidata: Wikidata — structured data, descriptions, and links (CC0 license)
about.tech_text: This project is built with modern web technologies:
about.tech_nextjs: Next.js — React framework with server-side rendering
about.tech_supabase: Supabase — PostgreSQL database with PostGIS for geographic queries
about.tech_leaflet: Leaflet — interactive maps with OpenStreetMap tiles
about.license_text: This project is open-source and released under the MIT License. The source code is available on GitHub.
about.privacy_text: This site does not use tracking cookies, does not collect personal data, and does not display advertisements. We respect your privacy.
about.disclaimer_text: Information on this site is provided as-is for informational purposes. While we strive for accuracy, conditions may change. This is not a booking platform — always verify details before visiting a destination.

error.not_found_text: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
error.error_text: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
